name: CometCloud AI
description: AI-curated crypto Fund-of-Funds — CIS scoring engine, cross-asset analytics (64 assets, 8 classes), institutional DeFi intelligence. Built for both human LPs and autonomous AI agents.

cis_scoring.description: CIS v4.0 — 5-pillar composite intelligence score (Fundamental, Momentum, On-chain, Sentiment, Alpha). Percentile-graded A+ through F. Macro-regime-aware.

cis_history.description: Per-asset CIS score history for trend analysis and sparklines.

cis_backtest.description: Backtest validation: realized 30d returns grouped by CIS grade. Shows predictive power.

market_data.description: Real-time prices, OHLCV, market movers, gas prices.

defi_data.description: DeFi TVL, DEX volumes, protocol revenues, stablecoin dominance, yield opportunities.

signals.description: Composite market signals: Fear & Greed, momentum, DeFi flows, stablecoin dynamics.

fund_data.description: CometCloud Vault — GP fund roster, performance, and portfolio optimization.

realtime.description: WebSocket stream for real-time CIS score updates. Sends current state on connect, then pushes updates on each local engine scoring cycle (~30 min).

recommended_flow: 2. Filter by grade (A+/A = STRONG BUY candidates)
5. Subscribe to /ws/cis for live score updates

assets.sg: signal (STRONG BUY / BUY / HOLD / REDUCE / AVOID)

authentication.note: Public read-only access. No API key required. Rate limits apply.
